section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Dane's Hat
cards.description: The sun-faded and lightly soiled hat of Dryleaf Dane. Worn low over the eyes, it obscures the wearer's vision.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.description: Sun-faded and lightly soiled travel attire worn by clergymen.

cards.description: Sun-faded and lightly soiled arm wraps.

Sun-faded and lightly soiled travel attire worn by clergymen.
Boots made of sturdy leather.

The black iron helm of Commander Gaius.

Black iron greaves made for Commander Gaius.
A cruel joke, for he could not wear them.

An Oathseeker Knight helm.
Black with gold ornamentation.

cards.description: Chest armor of Needle Knight Leda.

Oathseeker Knight chest armor.

cards.description: The pelt of Ralva the Great Red Bear, worn upon the head without modification.

cards.title: Iron Rivet Armor
cards.description:
Chest armor of Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness.
A vest reinforced with iron rivets.

cards.description:
Gauntlets of Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness.
Reinforced with iron rivets.

cards.description:
Greaves of Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness.
Reinforced with iron rivets.

cards.title: Fang Helm
cards.description:
Helm of Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness.
The cheek guards are shaped after lion fangs.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Thiollier's Mask
cards.description: A mask upon which is carved a tranquil sleeping face.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Thiollier's Garb
cards.description: The dark attire of those who wield poison in secret.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Thiollier's Gloves
cards.description: The dark gloves of those who wield poison in secret, ever scorned and loathed.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Thiollier's Trousers
cards.description: The dark trousers of those who wield poison in secret, ever scorned and loathed.

cards.description: The dark attire of those who wield poison in secret.

cards.title: High Priest Hat
cards.description: The hat of Count Ymir, High Priest.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: High Priest Robe
cards.description:
Robe of Count Ymir, High Priest.
Conceals the abundance of squirming beneath.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: High Priest Gloves
cards.description:
Gloves of Count Ymir, High Priest.
Soft and well-tailored.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: High Priest Undergarments
cards.description:
Undergarments of Count Ymir, High Priest.
Soft and well-tailored.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Finger Robe
cards.description:
Robe of Count Ymir, High Priest.
The front is open, exposing the squirming fingers beneath.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Caterpillar Mask
cards.description: Grotesque mask constructed from countless solidified caterpillars. A ritual implement of the greater potentates of Bonny Village.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Braided Cord Robe
cards.description: Ragged black cloth overlaid with braided cord. Attire of a vengeance-seeking hornsent.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Braided Arm Wraps
cards.description: Ragged black cloth tied with braided cord. Attire of a vengeance-seeking hornsent.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Soiled Loincloth
cards.description: This lightly soiled loincloth of ragged cloth does little more than conceal one's nether regions.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Dancer's Hood
cards.description:
Bright-red hood of the Ranah dancers.
Enhances the power of dancing attacks.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Dancer's Dress
cards.description:
Bright-red dress of the Ranah dancers.
Enhances the power of dancing attacks.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Dancer's Bracer
cards.description: Metal bracer of the Ranah dancers.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Dancer's Trousers
cards.description: Long, black trousers worn underneath the deep crimson dress of the Ranah dancers.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Dancer's Dress (Altered)
cards.description:
Altered form of the deep crimson dress of the Ranah dancers.
These are the black undergarments worn beneath.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Helm of Night
cards.description:
Bottomless black helm, cool to the touch.
Flowing lines in the seeming shape of a fingerprint adorn the surface. Imprisons the wearer in utterly lightless dark.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Armor of Night
cards.description:
Bottomless black chest armor, cool to the touch.
Flowing lines in the seeming shape of a fingerprint adorn the surface. Imprisons the wearer in utterly lightless dark.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Gauntlets of Night
cards.description:
Bottomless black gauntlets, cool to the touch.
Flowing lines in the seeming shape of a fingerprint adorn the surface. Imprisons the wearer in utterly lightless dark.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Greaves of Night
cards.description:
Bottomless greaves, cool to the touch.
Flowing lines in the seeming shape of a fingerprint adorn the surface. Imprisons the wearer in utterly lightless dark.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon's Helm
cards.description: Helm of the broken drake warrior Igon, from a set of armor comprised of a miscellany of parts. This tattered protective-wear is shaped like a bugle.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon's Armor
cards.description: Armor of the broken drake warrior Igon, from a set comprised of a miscellany of parts. Filthy belongings are attached to this tattered piece of protective-wear.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon's Gauntlets
cards.description:
Gauntlets of the broken drake warrior Igon. 
No more than a mish-mash of tatters and remnants stripped from a corpse found in the aftermath of a battle.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon's Loincloth
cards.description: Loincloth of the broken drake warrior Igon. Stripped from a corpse found in the aftermath of a battle, this scrap of cloth smells utterly foul.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon's Helm (Altered)
cards.description: Helm of the broken drake warrior Igon, from a set of armor comprised of a miscellany of parts. Patched with scraps of cloth.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon's Armor (Altered)
cards.description: Armor of the broken drake warrior Igon, from a set comprised of a miscellany of parts. Patched with scraps of cloth.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Wise Man's Mask
cards.description: The iron mask of Sir Ansbach, giving the appearance of a quiet, wise, old bearded man.

cards.title: Ansbach's Attire
cards.description: Attire of Sir Ansbach. The embroidered crest of the Pureblood Knights has now all but faded away.

cards.title: Ansbach's Manchettes
cards.description: Manchettes of Sir Ansbach. Black leather adorned with gold embroidery.

cards.title: Ansbach's Boots
cards.description: Boots of Sir Ansbach. Black leather adorned with gold embroidery.

cards.title: Ansbach's Attire (Altered)
cards.description: Attire of Sir Ansbach. Black cloth adorned with gold embroidery.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.description: Golden helm of Redmane Freyja, member of General Radahn's most distinguished knights.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.description: Golden armor of Redmane Freyja, member of General Radahn's most distinguished knights. Affixed with a black woolen mantle.

cards.description:
Steel helm of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol.
Part of a heavy armor set that covers the whole body in overlapping plates of steel.

cards.title: Armor of Solitude
cards.description:
Steel chest armor of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol.
Part of a heavy armor set that covers the whole body in overlapping plates of steel, and bedecked with a black cloak.

cards.description:
Steel gauntlets of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol.
Part of a heavy armor set that covers the whole body in overlapping plates of steel.

Steel greaves of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol.

Steel chest armor of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol.

cards.description: Helm worn by soldiers who serve Messmer the Impaler. The iron helm features a visor.

cards.description: Armor worn by soldiers who serve Messmer the Impaler. A ragged cloak is draped over rusted mail.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Messmer Soldier Gauntlets
cards.description: Gauntlets worn by soldiers who serve Messmer the Impaler, rusted and crusted in filth from fighting in unending war.

cards.title: Messmer Soldier Greaves
cards.description: Greaves worn by soldiers who serve Messmer the Impaler, rusted and crusted in filth from fighting in unending war.

cards.description: Armor worn by soldiers who serve Messmer the Impaler. The mail has rusted while fighting in unending war.

cards.title: Black Knight Helm
cards.description: Helm worn by the Black Knights, servants of Messmer the Impaler. Black iron ornamented with gold. A rotten odor stubbornly clings to it.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Black Knight Armor
cards.description: Armor worn by the Black Knights, servants of Messmer the Impaler.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.description: Greaves worn by the Black Knights, servants of Messmer the Impaler. Black iron ornamented with gold. A rotten odor stubbornly clings to it.

cards.title: Rakshasa Helm
cards.description: Helm of Rakshasa, soaked in the spurting blood of her victims. Tatters of ragged cloth jut out haphazardly, as if her lust for carnage threatens to break free.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Rakshasa Armor
cards.description: Armor of Rakshasa, soaked in the spurting blood of her victims. Tatters of ragged cloth jut out haphazardly, as if her lust for carnage threatens to break free.

cards.title: Death Mask Helm
cards.description: Helm of Wego, elder among the Fire Knights. Two warped death masks stacked one atop the other.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Winged Serpent Helm
cards.description: Helm of Kood, captain of the Fire Knights. A winged serpent perches atop it.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Salza's Hood
cards.description: Hood of Salza, sage of the Fire Knights.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Leather Headband
cards.description: Headband worn by highland warriors, made of woven leather. The white favor represents their home settlement.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Gloried Attire
cards.description: Traditional garb of highland warriors, made from woven fabric and finished with fur. This garment is made from fabrics with both blue and red patterns.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Leather Arm Wraps
cards.description: Arm wraps worn by highland warriors, made of sturdy leather and fastened with winding straps.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Leather Leg Wraps
cards.description: Leg wraps worn by highland warriors, made of sturdy leather and fastened with winding straps. The addition of animal pelt keeps the wearer warm.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Leather Crown
cards.description: Helm worn by highland warriors, pieced together using leather. The white favor represents their home settlement.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Highland Attire
cards.description: Traditional garb of highland warriors, made from woven fabric and finished with a blue patterned cloth.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Death Knight Helm
cards.description: Golden helm of the Death Knights, whose own death masks served as the visards of their armor.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Death Knight Armor
cards.description: Golden armor of the Death Knights, adorned with an antiquated depiction of the Erdtree.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Death Knight Gauntlets
cards.description: Golden gauntlets of the Death Knights, adorned with an antiquated depiction of the Erdtree.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Death Knight Greaves
cards.description: Golden greaves of the Death Knights, adorned with an antiquated depiction of the Erdtree.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Curseblade Mask
cards.description: A mask affixed with a crown of tangled horns, worn by those who would invoke divinity.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ascetic's Loincloth
cards.description: Attire of the tower's ascetics, embodying their commitment to an austere existence of strict self-control.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ascetic's Wrist Guards
cards.description: Wrist guards of the tower's ascetics which embody their commitment to an austere existence of strict self-control.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ascetic's Ankle Guards
cards.description: Ankle guards of the tower's ascetics which embody their commitment to an austere existence of strict self-control.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Messmer's Helm
cards.description:
Black helm of Messmer the Impaler, crowned with two intertwined winged serpents.
Slightly enhances incantations of Messmer's flame as well as Fire Knight skills.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Messmer's Armor
cards.description:
Black armor of Messmer the Impaler.
Draped with a red cloak bearing his crest embroidered.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Messmer's Gauntlets
cards.description: Black gauntlets of Messmer the Impaler.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Messmer's Greaves
cards.description: Black greaves of Messmer the Impaler.

cards.title: Messmer's Helm (Altered)
cards.description: Black helm of Messmer the Impaler, crowned with two intertwined winged serpents. Slightly enhances incantations of Messmer's fire as well as Fire Knight skills.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Gravebird Helm
cards.description:
Stone helm with a tinge of green. One of a set of armor pieces cast in the image of the Gravebird.
Empowers spells which summon rings of spectral light.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Gravebird's Blackquill Armor
cards.description:
Stone armor with a tinge of green. One of a set of armor pieces cast in the image of the Gravebird.
Featuring a cape of black Deathbird feathers, it enhances jumping attacks.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Gravebird Bracelets
cards.description: Stone bracelets with a tinge of green. One of a set of armor pieces cast in the image of the Gravebird.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Gravebird Anklets
cards.description: Stone anklets with a tinge of green. One of a set of armor pieces cast in the image of the Gravebird.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Gravebird Armor
cards.description: Stone armor with a tinge of green. One of a set of armor pieces cast in the image of the Gravebird.

cards.title: Common Soldier Helm
cards.description: Helm of the rank-and-file soldiers of Messmer's army.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Common Soldier Cloth Armor
cards.description: Cloth armor of the rank-and-file soldiers of Messmer's army.

cards.description: Gauntlets of the rank-and-file soldiers of Messmer's army.

cards.description: Greaves of the rank-and-file soldiers of Messmer's army.

cards.title: Horned Warrior Helm
cards.description: Helm featuring a crown of sturdy tangled horns, allowing the wearer to invoke divinity. Attire of the horned warriors, keepers of the tower.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Horned Warrior Armor
cards.description: Armor of the horned warriors, keepers of the tower.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Horned Warrior Gauntlets
cards.description: Gauntlets of the horned warriors, keepers of the tower, made from a thick metal.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Horned Warrior Greaves
cards.description: Greaves of the horned warriors, keepers of the tower. Shaped to resemble the unclothed form of a hero from older times.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Divine Beast Helm
cards.description: A helm of tangled horn attached to a divine beast mask, allowing the wearer to invoke divinity. Worn by divine beast warriors; the chosen of the horned warriors.

cards.description: Armor of feted horned warriors chosen to become divine beast warriors, adorned with a lion's pelt.

cards.description: A helm of tangled horn attached to a divine bird mask, allowing the wearer to invoke divinity. Worn by divine bird warriors; the very first of all horned warriors.

cards.title: Divine Bird Warrior Armor
cards.description: Armor of divine bird warriors, the very first of all horned warriors, made from a golden metal.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Divine Bird Warrior Gauntlets
cards.description: Gauntlets of divine bird warriors, the very first of all horned warriors, made from a golden metal.

cards.title: Divine Bird Warrior Greaves
cards.description: Greaves of divine bird warriors, the very first of all horned warriors, made from a golden metal.

cards.description: Ornate helm of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight, fashioned from silver steel.

cards.description: Ornate armor of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight, fashioned from silver steel.

cards.description: Gloves of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight, fashioned from quality leather.

cards.description: Ornate greaves of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight, fashioned from silver steel.

cards.title: Young Lion's Helm
cards.description: The golden helm worn by Radahn in his younger years. Proudly displaying his heroic red hair, it is fitting attire for a lion.

cards.title: Young Lion's Armor
cards.description: The golden armor worn by Radahn in his younger years. Proudly adorned with heroic red accents, it is fitting attire for a lion.

cards.title: Young Lion's Gauntlets
cards.description: The golden gauntlets worn by Radahn in his younger years.

cards.description: The golden greaves worn by Radahn in his younger years. Worn by a fierce lion.

cards.description: The golden armor worn by Radahn in his younger years. Worn by a fierce lion.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Circlet of Light
cards.description: The circlet of light which adorned Miquella's head as he returned in divine aspect. It has begun to fade into nothingness.

cards.title: Shadow Militiaman Helm
cards.description: Helm as dark as shadow, worn by vulgar militiamen.

cards.description: Greaves as dark as shadow, worn by vulgar militiamen.

cards.title: Divine Beast Head
cards.description: Ritual headwear in the form of a divine beast's head, used to perform the lion dance. Worn by the very finest of the sculpted keepers. Alas, it no longer responds to the old woman's earnest prayer.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: St. Trina's Blossom
cards.description: St. Trina's life withered and fell, as fleeting as the seasons. At her last, she left a single water lily.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Crucible Hammer-Helm
cards.description: Helm worn by Devonia, longest-serving of the Crucible Knights.

cards.title: Greatjar
cards.description: A greatjar which fits comfortably over the head when upturned. Attire of the shamans who perform their worship at gaols.

cards.title: Imp Head (Lion)
